axis_responsibility.Agent: Owns receipt and returned facts; raw:agent-received history is Agent evidence, not a success or failure classification.
axis_responsibility.Brick: Owns the work invariant and Building evidence contract: claim_trace raw_refs must resolve through raw/raw-manifest.json.
axis_responsibility.Link: Owns frontier, sufficiency, Movement, and transition facts; raw:link-frontier history is Link evidence, not a support-chosen route.
axis_responsibility.Support: Owns recording, final rewrite preservation, reconciliation, and checker fixtures; support must not author Movement or judgment.

candidate_file_changes: support/recording/raw_claim_trace.py: preserve/merge existing raw link frontier rows during final raw rewrite and expose raw_ref indexing helpers for reconciliation.
support/recording/lifecycle_emit.py: allow accumulated raw manifest construction to include preserved existing raw stream refs without changing axis meaning.
support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py: optionally share the existing frontier raw/manifest ref construction discipline with the final preservation helper.
support/operator/run.py: likely no behavior change beyond continuing to call the accumulated writer; only adjust if the accumulated writer needs an explicit preservation option.
support/checkers profiles/fixtures: add adapter-error-to-closure fixture and mutation RED pin under the existing path-shape invariant.
checker_or_verifier_plan: Add a focused fixture for adapter-error hold followed by coo-forward closure; assert all claim_trace raw_refs resolve through raw/raw-manifest.json and through the referenced raw stream.
Add a mutation probe that disables the preservation/manifest merge step; expected observation is RED with unresolved raw_ref through raw manifest.
Run reconciliation on a temp copy of the real iap root when available; expected observation is invariant green for derivable refs and explicit refusal for any non-derivable missing raw row.
Run compileall and git diff --check after implementation.

Run the focused checker plus mutation RED, then in a temp source copy run bake_dashboard_data_json() before PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --all.
returned.design_summary: Choose raw-stream-first append-only preservation. Future final closure rewrites must preserve already-recorded adapter-error frontier raw rows and receipt rows in raw streams and raw/raw-manifest.json, instead of leaving historical receipt/frontier claim traces pointing at refs that the final manifest no longer resolves. For already-written broken roots, reconciliation must derive from existing raw/*.jsonl only: add manifest coverage for raw refs that exist, and refuse to invent missing raw rows.
edge_cases: Multiple adapter-error attempts on the same step: preserve all distinct raw_refs and dedupe exact duplicates.
Final closure produces raw:link:N while prior hold produced raw:link-frontier:N: both refs must be allowed to coexist.
raw/agent-received.jsonl exists but final writer does not normally touch it: manifest repair must still include its refs.
raw/link-frontier ref remains in frontier_trace but the raw/link row is already gone: reconciliation must not reconstruct it from memory or claim_trace alone.
Graph link raw refs from graph_context must remain in the final manifest and not be displaced by frontier preservation.
invariants: Every raw_ref in every evidence/claim_trace/* file resolves through raw/raw-manifest.json.
Manifest entries and top-level raw_refs agree with the raw rows present in raw/*.jsonl.
Final closure must not orphan error-time receipt_trace or frontier_trace refs.
Reconciliation may derive projections from raw/*.jsonl, but must not invent missing raw rows.
Append-only history means preserving observed frontier/receipt raw history when the row still exists before final rewrite.
not_proven: No files were edited in this read-only design turn.
The real iap root could not be confirmed because it is absent from this checkout.
No temp-copy reconciliation proof was run.
No compileall, git diff --check, focused checker, mutation RED, or full gate was run.
Exact implementation signature for write_accumulated_building_evidence is not proven from this bounded reading list.
Semantic recovery of an already-lost raw:link-frontier row is not proven and should be treated as non-derivable unless the row exists in raw/*.jsonl.
observed_evidence: support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py defines the adapter-error frontier writer as support recording only and states it authors no Movement, target, or judgment.
At error time, _adapter_error_frontier_raw_manifest includes raw:agent-received refs, the adapter-error raw ref, and raw:link-frontier for the failed index.

At error time, write_adapter_error_frontier_raw_and_claim_trace writes raw/agent-received.jsonl, raw/adapter-error.jsonl, raw/link.jsonl, evidence/claim_trace/agent/receipt_trace.json, and evidence/claim_trace/link/frontier_trace.json.

Final write_raw_and_claim_trace rewrites raw/brick-work.jsonl, raw/agent-return.jsonl, raw/link.jsonl, and final claim traces, but it does not write raw/agent-received.jsonl, receipt_trace.json, or frontier_trace.json.

Final _accumulated_raw_manifest rebuilds raw_refs only from closed step_results as raw:brick:N, raw:agent:N, raw:link:N plus graph link refs; it has no adapter-error frontier or agent-received preservation input.

support/operator/run.py wires dynamic run and resume paths to both write_accumulated_building_evidence and write_adapter_error_frontier_evidence, so the observed disagreement is at the support recording final-rewrite seam.
The named real root project/brick-protocol/buildings/iap-dashboard-sink-passport-0612 is not present in this checkout; root-level confirmation from that path is not observed here.
returned.output_excerpt: { "observed_evidence": [ "support/recording/adapter_error_frontier.py defines the adapter-error frontier writer as support recording only and states it authors no Movement, target, or judgment.", "At error time, _adapter_error_frontier_raw_manifest includes raw:agent-received refs, the adapter-error raw ref, and raw:link-frontier for the failed index.", "At error time, write_adapter_error_frontier_raw_and_claim_trace writes raw/agent-received.jsonl, raw/adapter-error.jsonl, raw/link.jsonl, evidence/claim_trace/agent/receipt_trace.json, and evidence/claim_trace/link/frontier_trace.json.", "F...
proposed_changes: Add a small support recording helper that reads existing root raw/*.jsonl before final accumulated overwrite, indexes records by raw_ref, and preserves adapter-error frontier history refs into the final raw stream set.
Make write_raw_and_claim_trace merge final raw/link records with preserved raw:link-frontier:* records from the existing raw/link.jsonl, deduped by raw_ref with stable chronology.
Make the accumulated raw manifest include preserved raw/agent-received.jsonl, raw/adapter-error.jsonl, and raw/link.jsonl frontier refs when those rows exist in raw/*.jsonl.
Leave receipt_trace.json and frontier_trace.json intact on live future paths when every referenced raw_ref resolves after preservation.

Add a reconciliation verb under support that scans one given Building root, builds a raw_ref-to-stream map from that root's raw/*.jsonl, repairs raw/raw-manifest.json entries for derivable refs, and refuses to synthesize any raw row absent from raw/*.jsonl.
For broken roots where a claim_trace raw_ref is absent from every raw stream, the reconciliation verb should report the exact non-derivable ref and not pretend the lost raw row was recovered.
relevant_current_structure: Error-time support writer: adapter_error_frontier builds frontier raw records, receipt/frontier claim traces, and an expanded raw manifest.
Final support writer: raw_claim_trace and lifecycle_emit rebuild final raw/link and raw-manifest from in-memory closed step results.
Resume/run seam: run.py passes write_accumulated_building_evidence as the successful closure writer after a held frontier resumes.
Checker seam: building_lifecycle_path_shape is correct to reject claim_trace raw_refs that do not resolve through raw/raw-manifest.json.
returned.returned_summary: local CLI Agent Adapter returned support evidence
unchanged_surfaces: No brick/, agent/, link/, or project/ source edits.
No weakening of building_lifecycle_path_shape raw_ref resolution rejection.
No new Movement literal, GateFact authority, target selector, scheduler, queue, retry, provider runtime, or quality/success judgment.
No modification of the real iap root; reconciliation proof must use a temp copy only.
